zh.lifeSummary: 當John Belgrave於大約1490年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾貝爾格拉福時，他的父親Sir Richard Belgrave25歲，母親Margaret de Cotton18歲。他於1508年與Johanna Swyke在英國英格蘭素福爾可格萊姆斯福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1512年5月30日在英國英格蘭素福爾可格萊姆斯福德享年23歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Belgrave于大约1490年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾貝爾格拉福时，他的父亲Sir Richard Belgrave25岁，母亲Margaret de Cotton18岁。他于1508年与Johanna Swyke在英国英格兰素福爾可格萊姆斯福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1512年5月30日在英国英格兰素福爾可格萊姆斯福德享年23岁。

nameMeanings.name: Belgrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Leicestershire, recorded in Domesday Book as Merdegrave. The original name derived from Old English mearth ‘marten’ + grāf ‘grove’, but after the Norman Conquest the first element was taken to be Old French merde ‘dung, filth’, and changed to Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’, to remove the unpleasant association. A mid 12th-century writer refers to the place as ‘Merthegrave, nunc (now) Belegrava’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Belgrave was born about 1490, in Belgrave, Leicestershire, England, his father, Sir Richard Belgrave, was 25 and his mother, Margaret de Cotton, was 18. He married Johanna Swyke in 1508, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 30 May 1512, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 23.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Belgrave est né environ 1490, à Belgrave, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Belgrave, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Cotton, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Swyke en 1508, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 30 mai 1512, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 23 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Belgrave um 1490 in Belgrave, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Belgrave 25 und seine Mutter Margaret de Cotton 18. Er hat 1508 in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Johanna Swyke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 30. Mai 1512 im Alter von 23 Jahren in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Belgrave è nato il circa 1490 nel Belgrave, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Belgrave, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Cotton, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Johanna Swyke nel 1508, nel Glemsford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 30 maggio 1512, nel Glemsford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 23 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Belgraveが約1490年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアベルグラブで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Belgraveは25歳，母Margaret de Cottonは18歳であった。1508年にイギリスイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードでJohanna Swykeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1512年5月30日にイギリスイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードで23歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Belgrave(이)가 대략 1490년 영국 레이스스터실르 벨그레이브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Belgrave(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Cotton(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1508년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 Johanna Swyke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1512년 5월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 23세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Belgrave nasceu aproximadamente 1490, em Belgrave, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Belgrave, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Cotton, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna Swyke em 1508, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 30 de maio de 1512, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 23 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Belgrave родился около 1490 г. в местности белграв, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Belgrave было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Cotton, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Swyke в 1508 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 30 мая 1512 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 23 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Belgrave nació aproximadamente 1490, en Belgrave, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Belgrave, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret de Cotton, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Johanna Swyke en 1508, en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 30 de mayo de 1512, en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 23 años.
